ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dna_kits" (
  "kit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DNA kit */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the DNA kit */,
  "kit_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the DNA kit (e.g., Kit # N933**** YDNA) */,
  "dna_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DNA type (e.g., YDNA, mtDNA, FF/AUT) */,
  "gedmatch_id" TEXT /* Gedmatch ID associated with the DNA kit */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the DNA kit was uploaded */,
  "raw_data" TEXT /* Raw data of the DNA kit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dna_kits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dna_kits_dna_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("dna_type_id") REFERENCES dna_types ("dna_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dna_types" (
  "dna_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DNA type */,
  "dna_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the DNA type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the DNA type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dna_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ancestors" (
  "ancestor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ancestor */,
  "kit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DNA kit linked to the ancestor */,
  "ancestor_name" TEXT /* Name of the ancestor */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the ancestor */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the ancestor */,
  "birth_place" TEXT /* Birth place of the ancestor */,
  "death_place" TEXT /* Death place of the ancestor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ancestor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ancestors_kit_id FOREIGN KEY ("kit_id") REFERENCES dna_kits ("kit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "migration_paths" (
  "migration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each migration path */,
  "ancestor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ancestor associated with the migration path */,
  "migration_path" TEXT /* Description of the migration path (e.g., CAN>CAN) */,
  "migration_date" TEXT /* Date of the migration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("migration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_paths_ancestor_id FOREIGN KEY ("ancestor_id") REFERENCES ancestors ("ancestor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the group was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group member */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the user is a member of */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_members_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gedmatch" (
  "gedmatch_id" TEXT /* Gedmatch ID */,
  "kit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DNA kit associated with the Gedmatch ID */,
  "gedmatch_name" TEXT /* Name of the Gedmatch profile */,
  "gedmatch_email" TEXT /* Email address associated with the Gedmatch ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gedmatch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gedmatch_kit_id FOREIGN KEY ("kit_id") REFERENCES dna_kits ("kit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relative_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relative link */,
  "kit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DNA kit linked to the relative */,
  "relative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relative */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Description of the relationship (e.g., 2nd cousin) */,
  "common_ancestors" TEXT /* List of common ancestors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relative_links_kit_id FOREIGN KEY ("kit_id") REFERENCES dna_kits ("kit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relative_links_relative_id FOREIGN KEY ("relative_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relative_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relative request */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the request */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, accepted) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message sent with the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relative_requests_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relative_requests_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dna_migrations" (
  "migration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each migration */,
  "kit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DNA kit associated with the migration */,
  "migration_path" TEXT /* Description of the migration path (e.g., CAN>CAN) */,
  "migration_date" TEXT /* Date of the migration */,
  "migration_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the migration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("migration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dna_migrations_kit_id FOREIGN KEY ("kit_id") REFERENCES dna_kits ("kit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dna_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "kit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DNA kit associated with the group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dna_groups_kit_id FOREIGN KEY ("kit_id") REFERENCES dna_kits ("kit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dna_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DNA result */,
  "kit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DNA kit associated with the result */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of DNA result (e.g., YDNA, mtDNA, FF/AUT) */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* Data of the DNA result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dna_results_kit_id FOREIGN KEY ("kit_id") REFERENCES dna_kits ("kit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dna_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DNA segment */,
  "kit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DNA kit associated with the segment */,
  "segment_data" TEXT /* Data of the DNA segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dna_segments_kit_id FOREIGN KEY ("kit_id") REFERENCES dna_kits ("kit_id")
)
